WITH comment_score AS ( SELECT publication_id, AVG(num_likes)  AS comment_like_score 
 FROM public.comment
 WHERE profile_id = (SELECT id FROM public.profile WHERE username = @haight_clothing)
 LIMIT 1),
 average_comment AS (
 SELECT profile_id,
       ((publication_description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'commenting on ' || publication.description || '''')) 
          * ts_rank(publication_description_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', '' || comment.annotation || ''))::numeric)
        + (select sum(CASE WHEN publication_id = t.publication_id THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / count(*)
            FROM public.comment
            FROM public.publication desc
            WHERE descendant publication_id IN (
                SELECT id FROM public.comment
               
                WHERE profile_id = (SELECT id FROM public.profile WHERE username = @haight_clothing)
            )) AS engagement,
       avg(CASE WHEN comment.annotation ~~ '@%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reply_likelihood,
 
       num_followers, publication_description_lexemes
 FROM public.publication 
 JOIN public.comment ON (publication_id = profile.profile_id AND profile_id = comment.profile_id AND comment.reply_to IS NULL)
 JOIN public.profile on (publication.profile_id = comment.profile_id)
 JOIN public.publication_collab c2
  
    ON p3.publication_id = c2.publication_id
    and (p1.id = c2.origin_profile_id OR p1.id = c2.destination_profile_id),
p2.as publication
 FROM profile as P1 
 LEFT JOIN public.profile as p3 ON p3.id=(SELECT id FROM ( SELECT p3.destination_profile_id,
                     CASE WHEN p2.description ~~ '@%' THEN true ELSE false END
                 FROM public.publication AS p2
                   LEFT JOIN public.comment c ON p2.publication_id = c.publication_id
                    LEFT JOIN public.publication_collab pp3 ON p2.id = (pp3.destination_profile_id) AND pp3.origin_profile_id=(p1.id)
               )AS foo WHERE row_number<=2 ORDER BY publication.description DESC NULLS LAST)p1 AS desc ON (profile_id=p2.profile_id OR profile_id=p3.id),
author profile comment
 FROM public.publication 
 JOIN public.comment ON (comment.publication_id = publication.id AND comment.reply_to IS NOT NULL)
 WHERE ((publication.profile_id =(SELECT id FROM public.profile WHERE username = @haight_clothing)) ) LIMIT 1) AS 
 SELECT c3.publication_id,
       p1.full_name,
       (select case when avg(p4.num_followers)> count(*)/2 then 'Strongly Liked' else (case when avg((sum(CASE WHEN comment.annotation ~ '@%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/count(*))
        <avg(sum(CASE WHEN publication_id= t.publication_id THEN number LIKEs ELSE 0 end))::numeric)
             FROM public.comment
             FROM public.publication desc
              
             WHERE descendant publication_id IN (
              SELECT comment.profile_id FROM public.comment

                

                 AND publication.profile_id = (SELECT id FROM public.profile WHERE username = @haight_clothing)
                )) THEN 'Likely Liked' ELSE 'Not Likely Liked' END) AS likeliness,
       count(*) FILTER (WHERE reply_to IS NOT NULL)  + COUNT(comment.id) FILTER (WHERE reply_to IS NULL)  AS comment_count,
        profile_id, publication_description_lexemes
 FROM profiles JOIN (
 SELECT c3.publication_id ,
 
 C1.full_name ,p2.as desc
 FROM public.comment c2 
 JOIN public.publication collab pp4 On p5.origin_profile_id=(SELECT id FROM public.profile WHERE username = @haight_clothing) AND P3.profile_id=p2.id
 JOIN
 pub comment on (c1.publication_id=c3.publication_Id)
 LEFT JOIN publication ON (publication_id=p2.profile_id OR profile_id=p4.id)
on public.comment c3 
 FROM comment c1 ,
         p3 AS desc ON ((p2.profile_id = c3.profile_id OR profile_id=n4.id) )

                    OR c7.origin_profile_id = P3.id
